REAndroid/APKEditor.Changelog:
## What's Changed
* NEW: Using internal dex library.
* Full support dex files upto version 042 (_for more see help by running `java -jar APKEditor.jar d -h`_ ).
* Translation into Arabic by @Kirlif in https://github.com/REAndroid/APKEditor/pull/142
* Fix: Consolidate JSON Info output into a single object by @AbhiTheModder in https://github.com/REAndroid/APKEditor/pull/149

## New Contributors
* @AbhiTheModder made their first contribution in https://github.com/REAndroid/APKEditor/pull/149

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/REAndroid/APKEditor/compare/V1.4.1...V1.4.2

inotia00/revanced-cli.Changelog:
- Based on ReVanced Cli [5.0.0](https://github.com/ReVanced/revanced-cli/tree/v5.0.0)
- Added option command `options` (`options.json` file generator)
- Added option command `patches` (`patches.json` file generator)
- Added option command `--legacy-options` (set patch option via options.json file)
- Added option command `--rip-libs` (remove native libs from apk)
- Added option command `--unsigned` (disable signing of the final apk, regardless of whether it is mounted or not)
- Added support anti-split (merged some [REAndroid/ARSCLib](https://github.com/REAndroid/ARSCLib) sources to implement anti-split)

inotia00/revanced-patches.Changelog:
YouTube
==
- feat(YouTube): Add `Change live ring click action` patch (Thanks to @0xrxL)
- feat(YouTube): Add `Snack bar components` patch
- feat(YouTube - Change start page): Add more start pages https://github.com/inotia00/revanced-patches/pull/123
- feat(YouTube - Hide action buttons): Add patch option `Hide action buttons by index` (Experimental)
- feat(YouTube - Hide feed components): Add description for features that may no longer work (Close https://github.com/inotia00/ReVanced_Extended/issues/2712)
- feat(YouTube - Hide layout components): Rename setting `Hide Autoplay menu` to `Hide Autoplay or Playback menu`
- feat(YouTube - Overlay buttons): Allow setting patch options Bottom margin and Wider between-buttons space for YouTube 19.17+ https://github.com/inotia00/revanced-patches/pull/129
- feat(YouTube - Settings): Add `RVX language` setting https://github.com/inotia00/ReVanced_Extended/issues/2680
- feat(YouTube - Shorts components): Add `Open Shorts in regular player` setting
- feat(YouTube - Spoof streaming data): Add `VR default audio stream language` setting https://github.com/inotia00/ReVanced_Extended/issues/2670
- fix(YouTube): App crashes under certain conditions
- fix(YouTube - Hide feed components): News subpage is empty when `Hide carousel shelves` is on https://github.com/inotia00/revanced-patches/pull/124
- fix(YouTube - Hide feed components): Some litho filters are broken
- fix(YouTube - Spoof app version): Even in the latest version the default is still `18.17.43`
- fix(YouTube - Theme): Splash screen color attribute not specified in YouTube 19.44.39
- fix(YouTube - Video playback): Default video quality sometimes not applied
- fix(YouTube - Visual preferences icons): Icon is not shown properly when patch option is set to `Custom branding icon` https://github.com/inotia00/ReVanced_Extended/issues/2721
- chore(YouTube): Strings consistency https://github.com/inotia00/revanced-patches/pull/125
- chore(YouTube): Update patches information https://github.com/inotia00/revanced-patches/pull/126
- chore(YouTube - Seekbar components): Match with ReVanced


YouTube Music
==
- feat(YouTube Music): Add support version `8.02.53`
- feat(YouTube Music - Navigation bar components): Add `Enable custom navigation bar color` setting, Remove `Set navigation bar to black` setting
- fix(YouTube Music - Disable music video in album): Sometimes redirection fails


Reddit
==
- feat(Reddit - Remove subreddit dialog): Change behavior of `Remove NSFW warning dialog` setting (Instead of closing the dialog after it is shown, it will not show the dialog at all, only for Reddit 2025.01+)
- fix(Reddit - Remove subreddit dialog): Navigation bar is not visible when `Remove notification suggestion dialog` setting is turned on (Reddit 2025.02+)
- fix(Reddit - Remove subreddit dialog): Patch fails on older versions https://github.com/inotia00/ReVanced_Extended/issues/2688
- fix(Reddit - Remove subreddit dialog): `Remove notification suggestion dialog` setting does not work (Reddit 2025.02+)


Shared
==
- fix(GmsCore support): Patched apps are not added to Cloud Messaging https://github.com/inotia00/ReVanced_Extended/issues/2686
- fix(Spoof streaming data): Remove `Chipset` from parameter list
- chore: Clarify strings https://github.com/inotia00/revanced-patches/pull/130
- chore: Re-order and update strings https://github.com/inotia00/revanced-patches/pull/122
- chore: Reflecting changes in Kotlin 2.0.21
- chore: Update preference screen title casing https://github.com/inotia00/revanced-patches/pull/127


Announcement
==
- **There is a change in `options.json`. If you see warnings related to patch options, remove the `options.json` file or `Patch options`.**
- YouTube Music's support version has been upgraded to **7.25.53 / 8.02.53**, but please read the following issue and upgrade only if necessary: https://github.com/inotia00/ReVanced_Extended/issues/2554.
- Compatible ReVanced Manager: [RVX Manager v1.23.5 (fork)](https://github.com/inotia00/revanced-manager/releases/tag/v1.23.5).


Contribute to translation
==
